pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK version.
Upgrade modelmapper dependency to a version compatible with Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of modelmapper may fail to compile or run on Java 21 due to internal API changes or bytecode incompatibilities.

pom.xml.general_idea: Configure the Maven compiler plugin to use the release flag for Java 21 compatibility.
